name: Koreayo Fix Draft Lists v2 - Simple

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0.1, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an HTML formatter. Fix inline lists that should be proper HTML lists. PROBLEM PATTERNS TO FIX: 1. Numbered inline: "1. item 2. item 3. item" on same line 2. Dash inline: "– item – item – item" or "- item - item" 3. Mixed: "Category: – item1 – item2" CONVERT TO: - Numbered lists:
  1. item
- Bullet lists:
  • item
RULES: - Keep ALL existing HTML tags - Only restructure inline lists into proper HTML lists - Preserve all text content exactly - Add line breaks between list items Output JSON: { "fixed_content": "", "changes_made": number }' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Fix all inline lists in this HTML: ' + $json.content }] }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return { json: { status: 'SKIPPED', id: $json.id, title: $json.title, reason: $json.reason || 'Not processed' } };
